idea: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Car Rental Pickup Delays Signals Travel Disruption

data.source: Google Trends weekly car rental pickup delay searches

behavior: A sudden rise in searches related to car rental pickup delays indicates travel disruption and potential consumer frustration.

market_impact.rationale: Travel disruption tends to reduce discretionary travel spending impacting consumer discretionary sector ETFs.

trade_logic.entry: Entry when weekly Google Trends car rental delay search index rises 20% above 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit when index returns within 5% of 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Travel disruptions and rental delays frequently spike seasonally or due to weather/events.

idea: Daily Surge In FRED Series Producer Price Index For Steel Signals Industrial Cost Pressure
behavior: A sharp increase in steel producer prices signals rising input costs for industrial producers.

market_impact.rationale: Rising steel prices increase costs and compress margins for industrial companies.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short when weekly steel PPI increases 1.5% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit when weekly PPI growth slows below 0.5% week-over-week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Steel price fluctuations occur regularly with supply/demand shifts and tariff news.

idea: Daily Spike In USGS Earthquake Activity Near Major Ports Signals Freight Disruption Risk

data.source: USGS earthquake daily activity near LA and NY ports

behavior: Increased earthquake frequency near major ports can disrupt freight logistics and supply chains.

market_impact.rationale: Logistics disruptions reduce industrial and manufacturing output, hurting industrial sector ETFs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if daily earthquake count within 100km of key ports rises above 3 events
trade_logic.exit: Exit when daily count falls back below 2 events

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake swarms and aftershocks near ports regularly occur and can create short-term disruption risk.

idea: Weekly Google Trends Spike For Urgent Job Resignation Searches Signals Labor Market Stress

data.source: Google Trends weekly urgent job resignation related searches

behavior: Increasing urgency in job resignation searches implies rising employee stress and labor churn.

market_impact.rationale: High turnover and labor stress can disrupt retail and consumer discretionary operations.

trade_logic.entry: Entry when weekly urgent resignation searches rise 15% over 3-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit when searches revert to within 5% of 3-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor market stress and turnover spikes often respond to wage negotiations, inflation, or sector-specific shocks.

idea: Daily Surge In Google Trends For Emergency HVAC Repair Signals Consumer Stress Boosting Home Improvement

data.source: Google Trends daily emergency HVAC repair searches

behavior: Spikes in urgent HVAC repair searches indicate consumer stress driving demand for home services.

market_impact.rationale: Rising home repair demand supports consumer discretionary companies in home improvement.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long when daily searches spike 30% above 10-day moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit when search volume normalizes below 10% above moving average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: HVAC emergencies occur frequently due to weather changes and equipment failures.

idea: Weekly Google Trends Surge For Warehouse Automation Interest Signals Industrial Tech Demand

data.source: Google Trends weekly warehouse automation searches

behavior: Rising interest in warehouse automation points to increased industrial technology adoption.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector benefits from automation investment improving productivity and growth.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long when weekly search interest rises 25% over 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit when interest drops below 10% above 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Warehouse automation searches respond regularly to supply chain and labor cost dynamics.

idea: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Vehicle Battery Replacement Searches Signals Auto Repair Stress

data.source: Google Trends daily emergency vehicle battery replacement searches

behavior: Spike in emergency vehicle battery replacement searches indicates rising auto repair stress.

market_impact.rationale: Higher auto repair demand lifts industrial sector companies servicing vehicle parts and maintenance.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long when daily search volume spikes 40% above 10-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit when volume falls below 15% above 10-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Vehicle battery failures spike seasonally and with cold snaps or electrical system recalls.

idea: Weekly Spike In Google Trends For Corporate Layoff Announcement Searches Signals Labor Market Weakness

data.source: Google Trends weekly corporate layoff announcement searches

behavior: Increased search interest for corporate layoff announcements signals rising labor market weakness.

market_impact.rationale: Labor weakness can reduce consumer spending and increase credit risk, affecting financials.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short when weekly searches rise 20% above 5-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit when weekly searches decline below 10% above 5-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Layoff news and related search interest regularly spike due to earnings season and economic data.

idea: Daily Surge In Open Charge Map EV Charger New Install Counts Signals Auto Tech Growth

data.source: OpenChargeMap daily new EV charger counts

behavior: Accelerated EV charger installations indicate growing EV adoption and infrastructure expansion.

market_impact.rationale: EV infrastructure growth supports consumer discretionary auto tech and green vehicle sectors.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long when daily new charger installs increase 30% above 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit when installs fall below 10% above 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV charger installation rates fluctuate with government incentives and market expansion.

idea: Weekly Google Trends Spike For Urgent Freight Delays Signals Supply Chain Pressure

data.source: Google Trends weekly urgent freight delay searches

behavior: Spiking freight delay searches indicate bottlenecks and supply chain stress.

market_impact.rationale: Freight delays reduce industrial production efficiency and increase costs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short when weekly search interest rises 25% above 6-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit when interest falls below 10% above 6-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight delays are common due to weather, labor strikes, or port congestion.

idea: Daily Spike In FRED Series Natural Gas Price Volatility Signals Energy Sector Stress
behavior: Sharp daily swings in natural gas prices indicate energy market volatility and supply concerns.

market_impact.rationale: Energy sector valuation is sensitive to input price volatility and supply risk.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short when daily natural gas price change exceeds 5% absolute move
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when volatility subsides below 2%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Natural gas prices routinely exhibit sharp moves due to weather, geopolitical events, and inventory reports.

idea: Weekly Google Trends Spike In Searches For 'Delivery Driver Job' Signals Labor Tightness In Logistics

data.source: Google Trends weekly 'delivery driver job' searches

behavior: Rising job searches for delivery drivers indicate labor shortages and wage pressure in logistics.

market_impact.rationale: Labor tightness increases costs and disrupts industrial logistics operations.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short when weekly searches rise 20% above 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit when searches fall below 10% above 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Driver shortages fluctuate with economic cycles and seasonal demand.

idea: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Urgent Local Business Permit Complaints Signals Local Economic Stress

data.source: Google Trends daily local business permit complaint searches

behavior: Sudden spikes in searches complaining about local business permits indicate regulatory or economic stress.

market_impact.rationale: Local business regulatory issues can slow commercial real estate activity and development.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short when daily searches spike 35% above 14-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit when searches return to within 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Local regulatory complaints spike frequently due to permit delays or policy changes.

idea: Weekly Google Trends Spike In Searches For 'Home Solar Panel Repair' Signals Green Energy Sector Repair Demand

data.source: Google Trends weekly home solar panel repair searches

behavior: Growing search interest for solar panel repair reflects aging infrastructure and consumer stress in green energy adoption.

market_impact.rationale: Repair demand supports energy services and green energy equipment sectors.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long when weekly search interest rises 30% above 5-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit when interest falls below 15% above 5-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Solar panel maintenance needs frequently increase during seasonal weather transitions.

idea: Daily Spike In Yahoo Finance Volume For XLF With Price Decline Signals Financial Sector Capitulation

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily XLF price and volume

behavior: Unusual volume spikes alongside price declines indicate panic selling and potential short-term bottom.

market_impact.rationale: Financial sector often rebounds sharply after capitulation volume spikes.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long when XLF price drops >2% and volume is 2x 20-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when price recovers 3%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Financial sector volatility is common with macro shocks and earnings season.
